chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Crl. Misc. Appln. No.D-13 of 2017 Date of Hearing ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 17.01.2018. 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of Case. M/s Muhammad Murad Chachar and Abdul Rahman A. Bhutto, advocates for the applicant. Mr. Khadim Hussain Khooharo, Addl. P.G. ----------------- By means of this application moved under Section 497, Cr.P.C, the applicant/complainant of FIR bearing Crime No.43/2017 of Police Station Kashmore, is seeking cancellation of bail of the respondent No.1, namely, Abdul Waheed, who has been granted bail by the trial Court viz. Judge, Anti-Terrorism Court, Kashmore at Kandhkot vide impugned order dated 09.6.2017. The learned Addl. P.G has supported the impugned order. The record reflects that the complainant is Chairman of Town Committee, Kashmore, whereas the respondent No.1 is the Town Officer in the same town committee. Apparently, there appears some professional rivalry between the two groups working in the same office. In the FIR only one ineffective fire on the complainant is attributed to respondent No.1. The trial Court has given valid reasons while granting bail to respondent No.1 and learned Counsel for the applicant has not been able to show that which material has not been considered by the trial Court in granting bail to him. In the circumstances, this application has no merits and is accordingly dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE
